title: senna multijuga var. verrucosa
intro: Senna multijuga var. verrucosa, also known as the 'rough senna' or ' rough senna pod', is a plant species of the Fabaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its use as a laxative due to the presence of sennosides, which stimulate bowel movements and relieve constipation. The health benefits of Senna multijuga var. verrucosa include its ability to aid in weight loss, improve digestion, and relieve symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, such as tea, capsules, or powder, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat gastrointestinal issues.
